home.intro: Hello! I'm a Web Developer intern with a strong passion for building modern user interfaces and optimizing user experience. I'm currently a Computer Science student at Sai Gon University, working as a Web Developer intern at APE TECH Solutions. I'm actively learning and improving my skills through personal and group projects.

exam.description: A smart examination portal featuring GPT-powered chatbot assistance, real-time messaging, and efficient student data management.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: Hi! I'm a Full-Stack Developer with over 1 year of experience in developing web applications. I am passionate about learning new technologies and always looking for creative ways to solve complex problems.
about.bio2: My expertise includes React, Node.js, MySQL, and cloud technologies like AWS. I have experience working with both startups and large companies, from building MVPs to scaling systems serving millions of users.
about.bio3: Besides coding, I enjoy reading technology books, writing blogs to share knowledge, and participating in developer community activities. I believe that sharing knowledge helps the entire community grow stronger.

q1.question: Do you work on freelance projects?
q1.answer: Yes, I accept freelance projects that fit my schedule and expertise. Please contact me to discuss the details.

q2.question: What is your average email response time?
q2.answer: I usually reply to emails within 24 hours on business days. For urgent questions, you can call directly.

q3.question: Do you offer technical architecture consulting?
q3.answer: Yes, I provide consulting services on system architecture, technology selection and best practices for projects.

q4.question: How much does a web project usually cost?
q4.answer: The cost depends on complexity, timeline and specific requirements. Please describe the project so I can provide an accurate quote.

location.title: Location
location.desc: I'm currently working in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. I'm also available for remote work on suitable projects.
